SELECT [p].[ProductoID], [p].[CategoriaPrincipalID], [p].[Codigo], [p].[Descripcion], [p].[DescripcionCorta], [p].[Estado], [p].[FechaActualizacion], [p].[FechaCreacion], [p].[ImagenPrincipal], [p].[MarcaID], [p].[Nombre], [p].[PrecioCompra], [p].[PrecioOferta], [p].[PrecioVenta], [p].[Stock], [p].[TipoProductoID], [c].[CategoriaPrincipalID], [c].[Descripcion], [c].[Estado], [c].[Imagen], [c].[Nombre], [m].[MarcaID], [m].[Estado], [m].[Logo], [m].[Nombre], [m].[SitioWeb], [t].[TipoProductoID], [t].[Descripcion], [t].[Estado], [t].[Nombre], [p0].[ProductoImagenID], [p0].[Orden], [p0].[ProductoID], [p0].[URL], [t0].[ProductoTallaID], [t0].[ProductoID], [t0].[StockTalla], [t0].[TallaID], [t0].[TallaID0], [t0].[Nombre], [t0].[Orden], [t2].[ProductoColorID], [t2].[ColorID], [t2].[ProductoID], [t2].[ColorID0], [t2].[CodigoHex], [t2].[Estado], [t2].[Nombre], [v].[ValoracionID], [v].[Comentario], [v].[Estado], [v].[FechaCreacion], [v].[NoUtil], [v].[PedidoID], [v].[ProductoID], [v].[Puntuacion], [v].[UsuarioID], [v].[Util], [v].[VerificadoCompra]
FROM [Productos] AS [p]
INNER JOIN [CategoriasPrincipales] AS [c] ON [p].[CategoriaPrincipalID] = [c].[CategoriaPrincipalID]
INNER JOIN [Marcas] AS [m] ON [p].[MarcaID] = [m].[MarcaID]
INNER JOIN [TiposProducto] AS [t] ON [p].[TipoProductoID] = [t].[TipoProductoID]
LEFT JOIN [ProductoImagenes] AS [p0] ON [p].[ProductoID] = [p0].[ProductoID]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p1].[ProductoTallaID], [p1].[ProductoID], [p1].[StockTalla], [p1].[TallaID], [t1].[TallaID] AS [TallaID0], [t1].[Nombre], [t1].[Orden]
    FROM [ProductoTallas] AS [p1]
    INNER JOIN [Tallas] AS [t1] ON [p1].[TallaID] = [t1].[TallaID]
) AS [t0] ON [p].[ProductoID] = [t0].[ProductoID]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p2].[ProductoColorID], [p2].[ColorID], [p2].[ProductoID], [c0].[ColorID] AS [ColorID0], [c0].[CodigoHex], [c0].[Estado], [c0].[Nombre]
    FROM [ProductoColores] AS [p2]
    INNER JOIN [Colores] AS [c0] ON [p2].[ColorID] = [c0].[ColorID]
) AS [t2] ON [p].[ProductoID] = [t2].[ProductoID]
LEFT JOIN [Valoraciones] AS [v] ON [p].[ProductoID] = [v].[ProductoID]

SELECT [p].[ProductoID], [p].[CategoriaPrincipalID], [p].[Codigo], [p].[Descripcion], [p].[DescripcionCorta], [p].[Estado], [p].[FechaActualizacion], [p].[FechaCreacion], [p].[ImagenPrincipal], [p].[MarcaID], [p].[Nombre], [p].[PrecioCompra], [p].[PrecioOferta], [p].[PrecioVenta], [p].[Stock], [p].[TipoProductoID], [c].[CategoriaPrincipalID], [c].[Descripcion], [c].[Estado], [c].[Imagen], [c].[Nombre], [m].[MarcaID], [m].[Estado], [m].[Logo], [m].[Nombre], [m].[SitioWeb], [t].[TipoProductoID], [t].[Descripcion], [t].[Estado], [t].[Nombre], [p0].[ProductoImagenID], [p0].[Orden], [p0].[ProductoID], [p0].[URL], [t0].[ProductoTallaID], [t0].[ProductoID], [t0].[StockTalla], [t0].[TallaID], [t0].[TallaID0], [t0].[Nombre], [t0].[Orden], [t2].[ProductoColorID], [t2].[ColorID], [t2].[ProductoID], [t2].[ColorID0], [t2].[CodigoHex], [t2].[Estado], [t2].[Nombre], [v].[ValoracionID], [v].[Comentario], [v].[Estado], [v].[FechaCreacion], [v].[NoUtil], [v].[PedidoID], [v].[ProductoID], [v].[Puntuacion], [v].[UsuarioID], [v].[Util], [v].[VerificadoCompra]
FROM [Productos] AS [p]
INNER JOIN [CategoriasPrincipales] AS [c] ON [p].[CategoriaPrincipalID] = [c].[CategoriaPrincipalID]
INNER JOIN [Marcas] AS [m] ON [p].[MarcaID] = [m].[MarcaID]
INNER JOIN [TiposProducto] AS [t] ON [p].[TipoProductoID] = [t].[TipoProductoID]
LEFT JOIN [ProductoImagenes] AS [p0] ON [p].[ProductoID] = [p0].[ProductoID]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p1].[ProductoTallaID], [p1].[ProductoID], [p1].[StockTalla], [p1].[TallaID], [t1].[TallaID] AS [TallaID0], [t1].[Nombre], [t1].[Orden]
    FROM [ProductoTallas] AS [p1]
    INNER JOIN [Tallas] AS [t1] ON [p1].[TallaID] = [t1].[TallaID]
) AS [t0] ON [p].[ProductoID] = [t0].[ProductoID]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p2].[ProductoColorID], [p2].[ColorID], [p2].[ProductoID], [c0].[ColorID] AS [ColorID0], [c0].[CodigoHex], [c0].[Estado], [c0].[Nombre]
    FROM [ProductoColores] AS [p2]
    INNER JOIN [Colores] AS [c0] ON [p2].[ColorID] = [c0].[ColorID]
) AS [t2] ON [p].[ProductoID] = [t2].[ProductoID]
LEFT JOIN [Valoraciones] AS [v] ON [p].[ProductoID] = [v].[ProductoID]
WHERE [p].[Estado] = @__p_0
ORDER BY [p].[ProductoID], [c].[CategoriaPrincipalID], [m].[MarcaID], [t].[TipoProductoID], [p0].[ProductoImagenID], [t0].[ProductoTallaID], [t0].[TallaID0], [t2].[ProductoColorID], [t2].[ColorID0]

2026-03-09 14:44:29.611 -05:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (150ms) [Parameters=[@__p_0='?' (Size = 20)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT [p].[ProductoID], [p].[CategoriaPrincipalID], [p].[Codigo], [p].[Descripcion], [p].[DescripcionCorta], [p].[Estado], [p].[FechaActualizacion], [p].[FechaCreacion], [p].[ImagenPrincipal], [p].[MarcaID], [p].[Nombre], [p].[PrecioCompra], [p].[PrecioOferta], [p].[PrecioVenta], [p].[Stock], [p].[TipoProductoID], [c].[CategoriaPrincipalID], [c].[Descripcion], [c].[Estado], [c].[Imagen], [c].[Nombre], [m].[MarcaID], [m].[Estado], [m].[Logo], [m].[Nombre], [m].[SitioWeb], [t].[TipoProductoID], [t].[Descripcion], [t].[Estado], [t].[Nombre], [p0].[ProductoImagenID], [p0].[Orden], [p0].[ProductoID], [p0].[URL], [t0].[ProductoTallaID], [t0].[ProductoID], [t0].[StockTalla], [t0].[TallaID], [t0].[TallaID0], [t0].[Nombre], [t0].[Orden], [t2].[ProductoColorID], [t2].[ColorID], [t2].[ProductoID], [t2].[ColorID0], [t2].[CodigoHex], [t2].[Estado], [t2].[Nombre], [v].[ValoracionID], [v].[Comentario], [v].[Estado], [v].[FechaCreacion], [v].[NoUtil], [v].[PedidoID], [v].[ProductoID], [v].[Puntuacion], [v].[UsuarioID], [v].[Util], [v].[VerificadoCompra]
FROM [Productos] AS [p]
INNER JOIN [CategoriasPrincipales] AS [c] ON [p].[CategoriaPrincipalID] = [c].[CategoriaPrincipalID]
INNER JOIN [Marcas] AS [m] ON [p].[MarcaID] = [m].[MarcaID]
INNER JOIN [TiposProducto] AS [t] ON [p].[TipoProductoID] = [t].[TipoProductoID]
LEFT JOIN [ProductoImagenes] AS [p0] ON [p].[ProductoID] = [p0].[ProductoID]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p1].[ProductoTallaID], [p1].[ProductoID], [p1].[StockTalla], [p1].[TallaID], [t1].[TallaID] AS [TallaID0], [t1].[Nombre], [t1].[Orden]
    FROM [ProductoTallas] AS [p1]
    INNER JOIN [Tallas] AS [t1] ON [p1].[TallaID] = [t1].[TallaID]

LEFT JOIN [ProductoImagenes] AS [p0] ON [p].[ProductoID] = [p0].[ProductoID]

) AS [t0] ON [p].[ProductoID] = [t0].[ProductoID]

    FROM [ProductoColores] AS [p2]

) AS [t2] ON [p].[ProductoID] = [t2].[ProductoID]

) AS [t0] ON [p].[ProductoID] = [t0].[ProductoID]

) AS [t2] ON [p].[ProductoID] = [t2].[ProductoID]

) AS [t3] ON [p].[ProductoID] = [t3].[ProductoID]

INNER JOIN [CategoriasPrincipales] AS [c] ON [p].[CategoriaPrincipalID] = [c].[CategoriaPrincipalID]
INNER JOIN [Marcas] AS [m] ON [p].[MarcaID] = [m].[MarcaID]

LEFT JOIN [ProductoImagenes] AS [p0] ON [p].[ProductoID] = [p0].[ProductoID]
LEFT JOIN (

) AS [t0] ON [p].[ProductoID] = [t0].[ProductoID]

) AS [t2] ON [p].[ProductoID] = [t2].[ProductoID]
LEFT JOIN (

    FROM [ProductoMateriales] AS [p3]
    INNER JOIN [Materiales] AS [m0] ON [p3].[MaterialID] = [m0].[MaterialID]
) AS [t3] ON [p].[ProductoID] = [t3].[ProductoID]

SELECT [p].[ProductoID], [p].[CategoriaPrincipalID], [p].[Codigo], [p].[Descripcion], [p].[DescripcionCorta], [p].[Estado], [p].[FechaActualizacion], [p].[FechaCreacion], [p].[ImagenPrincipal], [p].[MarcaID], [p].[Nombre], [p].[PrecioCompra], [p].[PrecioOferta], [p].[PrecioVenta], [p].[Stock], [p].[TipoProductoID], [c].[CategoriaPrincipalID], [c].[Descripcion], [c].[Estado], [c].[Imagen], [c].[Nombre], [m].[MarcaID], [m].[Estado], [m].[Logo], [m].[Nombre], [m].[SitioWeb], [t].[TipoProductoID], [t].[Descripcion], [t].[Estado], [t].[Nombre], [p0].[ProductoImagenID], [p0].[ColorNombre], [p0].[Orden], [p0].[ProductoID], [p0].[URL], [t0].[ProductoTallaID], [t0].[ProductoID], [t0].[StockTalla], [t0].[TallaID], [t0].[TallaID0], [t0].[Nombre], [t0].[Orden], [t2].[ProductoColorID], [t2].[ColorID], [t2].[ProductoID], [t2].[ColorID0], [t2].[CodigoHex], [t2].[Estado], [t2].[Nombre], [t3].[ProductoMaterialID], [t3].[MaterialID], [t3].[Porcentaje], [t3].[ProductoID], [t3].[MaterialID0], [t3].[Descripcion], [t3].[Estado], [t3].[Nombre], [v].[ValoracionID], [v].[Comentario], [v].[Estado], [v].[FechaCreacion], [v].[NoUtil], [v].[PedidoID], [v].[ProductoID], [v].[Puntuacion], [v].[UsuarioID], [v].[Util], [v].[VerificadoCompra]
FROM [Productos] AS [p]
INNER JOIN [CategoriasPrincipales] AS [c] ON [p].[CategoriaPrincipalID] = [c].[CategoriaPrincipalID]
INNER JOIN [Marcas] AS [m] ON [p].[MarcaID] = [m].[MarcaID]
INNER JOIN [TiposProducto] AS [t] ON [p].[TipoProductoID] = [t].[TipoProductoID]
LEFT JOIN [ProductoImagenes] AS [p0] ON [p].[ProductoID] = [p0].[ProductoID]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p1].[ProductoTallaID], [p1].[ProductoID], [p1].[StockTalla], [p1].[TallaID], [t1].[TallaID] AS [TallaID0], [t1].[Nombre], [t1].[Orden]
    FROM [ProductoTallas] AS [p1]
    INNER JOIN [Tallas] AS [t1] ON [p1].[TallaID] = [t1].[TallaID]
) AS [t0] ON [p].[ProductoID] = [t0].[ProductoID]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p2].[ProductoColorID], [p2].[ColorID], [p2].[ProductoID], [c0].[ColorID] AS [ColorID0], [c0].[CodigoHex], [c0].[Estado], [c0].[Nombre]
    FROM [ProductoColores] AS [p2]
    INNER JOIN [Colores] AS [c0] ON [p2].[ColorID] = [c0].[ColorID]
) AS [t2] ON [p].[ProductoID] = [t2].[ProductoID]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p3].[ProductoMaterialID], [p3].[MaterialID], [p3].[Porcentaje], [p3].[ProductoID], [m0].[MaterialID] AS [MaterialID0], [m0].[Descripcion], [m0].[Estado], [m0].[Nombre]
    FROM [ProductoMateriales] AS [p3]
    INNER JOIN [Materiales] AS [m0] ON [p3].[MaterialID] = [m0].[MaterialID]
) AS [t3] ON [p].[ProductoID] = [t3].[ProductoID]
LEFT JOIN [Valoraciones] AS [v] ON [p].[ProductoID] = [v].[ProductoID]
WHERE [p].[Estado] = @__p_0
ORDER BY [p].[ProductoID], [c].[CategoriaPrincipalID], [m].[MarcaID], [t].[TipoProductoID], [p0].[ProductoImagenID], [t0].[ProductoTallaID], [t0].[TallaID0], [t2].[ProductoColorID], [t2].[ColorID0], [t3].[ProductoMaterialID], [t3].[MaterialID0]
